sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_table (id INT, xml_data XML);
UPDATE example_table SET xml_data = XMLAppendChildren(xpath_eval('//b', xml_data), xtree_doc('<comma/>'), ' world', xtree_doc('<excl/>')) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, xpath_eval('/', xml_data) AS original_xml, xpath_eval('/', xml_data) AS modified_xml FROM example_table WHERE id = 1;
